projects.title: Interactive Rating Component
projects.description: An interactive UI component built with HTML, CSS, and Vanilla JavaScript that demonstrates clean state management, DOM manipulation, and conditional rendering without relying on external frameworks.

projects.title: To Do List App
projects.description: A modern and responsive To Do List application built with React to help users add, edit, delete, and manage daily tasks efficiently.

projects.title: Currency Converter
projects.description: A modern and responsive Currency Converter application built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to help users convert between currencies quickly and efficiently through a simple and user-friendly interface.
